hero.label: Multi-Agent Framework
hero.title: Intelligence Emerges Through Connection
hero.description: Build interconnected agent systems where collaboration creates intelligence. Persistent memory, social identity, and narrative structure.

communication.title: Inter-Agent Communication
communication.description: Matrix protocol messaging with group chats, @mentions, and coordinated workflows between agents.

memory.title: Narrative Memory
memory.description: Semantic storylines maintained across sessions, retrieved by topic similarity — not chronological order.

modules.title: Hot-Swappable Modules
modules.description: 9 independent capability modules with plug-and-play architecture. Add, remove, or swap without downtime.

skills.title: Skill Marketplace
skills.description: Chat-based skill discovery and installation. Describe what you need, get recommendations, one-click install.

llm.title: Multi-LLM Support
llm.description: Unified adapter layer supporting Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini with configurable embedding providers.

costs.title: LLM Cost Tracking
costs.description: Real-time metering of every API call with per-model cost breakdowns and daily trend analysis.

quickStart.title: Get Started in Seconds
quickStart.description: One command to install and run. NarraNexus handles the rest.
quickStart.macDownload: Download the NarraNexus desktop app for macOS — one-click install, auto-updates included.

integrations.title: Works With Everything
integrations.description: Seamlessly integrates with your existing tools and infrastructure.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: Where we've been and where we're going.

team.title: Built by
team.description: An open-source project by NetMind and the NetMindAI community.

cta.title: Start Building Connected Agent Systems
cta.description: Join the community building the next generation of collaborative AI agents.

docs.notTranslated: This page has not been translated yet. Showing English version.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: A modular pipeline from user interface to persistent storage.

demoShowcase.title: See It in Action
demoShowcase.description: Explore the NarraNexus interface and capabilities.
